creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 216225
Additional patch for popt 1.18 v2

Fix incorrect handling of leftovers with poptStuffArgs

Source:
https://salsa.debian.org/debian/popt/-/blob/debian/sid/debian/patches/318833-incorrect-handling-of-leftovers-with-poptStuffArgs.patch

The configure script ignores if it cannot find gettext (libintl.h) if NLS is enabled leading to various issues with users, adding localbase fix the issue.

Thanks to VVD <vvd@unislabs.com> for debugging this issue!
